plugins.name: glados
plugins.description: GLaDOS — agentic development framework with structured workflows, modules, and personas

plugins.name: relay-ds
plugins.description: Relay DS — an 8-agent Figma-to-React pipeline. Takes a Figma component and produces source, Storybook stories with interaction tests, an accessibility report, and a visual comparison via Understand → Build → Verify phases, with pluggable design-system adapters and structured human gates.
